title: SunbirdEd Portal
subtitle: A modern, scalable educational platform
description: Built for the 21st century with state-of-the-art technology
heroTitle: Unlock Your Potential with Expert-Led Training
heroSubtitle: Access thousands of courses designed to help you grow professionally and personally. Learn at your own pace, anywhere, anytime.
courseDesc: Design courses using collections and resources. Courses are for a duration, to achieve an objective.
contentDesc: Create different resources like story, game, activity, audio, video, using the inbuilt authoring tools.
quizDesc: Create assessments with multiple question types to evaluate learner understanding.
collectionDesc: Compile and organize multiple resources of your choice into a structured collection.
uploadContentDesc: You can upload content files directly to the platform.
uploadLargeVideosDesc: Upload large video files (>50 MB) with optimized processing.
